name: Dashboard shows stat row and Today's Quests with progress bars
description: After logging in, the dashboard shows a prominent cards-due stat, an ambient row of streak / XP / coins, and a Today's Quests panel containing three quest items, each rendered as a card with a filled progress bar and an 'x / max' count.

planSteps.description: Enter valid credentials and submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the dashboard shows a 'Cards due today' stat with a numeric value, and an ambient stat row containing Streak, XP, and Coins values displayed side-by-side on one line

Verify a 'Today's Quests' panel shows three distinct quest cards (Review cards, Explain concepts, Study minutes) laid out side-by-side in a row on desktop width, each quest card containing a horizontal progress bar and a numeric 'current / target' label — not a plain text list
